topic.title: General
topic.shortdesc: Bump cap, safety glasses, hearing protection, long sleeves, safety-toed shoes, respirator or PAPR, cut-resistant gloves.

body.p: Bump cap, safety glasses, hearing protection, long sleeves, safety-toed shoes, respirator or PAPR, cut-resistant gloves.

p.b: Have a respirator or PAPR available in case of a silica release.
